use_cases: Quickly navigating to pages or features within an application using keyboard shortcuts
Executing commands or actions without navigating through menus
Searching through content, files, or data with instant results
Providing power users with efficient keyboard-driven workflows
Improving app accessibility with keyboard-first interactions
ai_summary: A keyboard-navigable command palette component that opens via Cmd/Ctrl+K shortcut or click. Features search input with focus management, backdrop overlay with click-to-close, and Escape key dismissal. Designed for efficient navigation and command execution in productivity applications, commonly used in SaaS, developer tools, and content management systems.
